productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men M Basic White Shorts
description: Composition White tennis shorts made of 100% polyster with an inner mesh lining, handy side pockets with black piping, comfortable elastic waist band with inner drawstring, brand name and logo printed on the left leg Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash in cold water below 30 Degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo Whether you're playing at Wimbledon or in your local park, these white tennis shorts from adidas will give you the comfort and flexibility you require during your matches. The mesh lining ensures better breathability during games, and the soft waistband provides a snug Fit along with a drawstring. Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the shorts draw sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable.Team the stark white shorts with a smart tee and a pair of tennis shoes and get ready to rule the court! Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
